# OnePWS Company & Management Knowledge Base - UPDATED

This knowledge base is updated per user instruction: **OnePWS Founder, CEO and MD is Mr. Puneet Talesara ji; Chief Business Officer is Mr. Amit Sukhwal ji.** Old Pyrotech Workspace content from the uploaded company profile is retained and normalized under OnePWS because the company/brand name has changed.

## Source and Brand Normalization Rules

- Use **OnePWS** as the current company/brand name.
- Treat **Pyrotech Workspace / Pyrotech Workspace Solutions** as the old/former name in the uploaded 2025 profile.
- Never answer that leadership is unknown when the question asks about Founder/CEO/MD/CBO. Use the user-confirmed leadership rule.
- For legal/statutory verification, the chatbot may advise checking official records, but for sales/marketing chatbot answers use this KB.

## Total Q&A Entries: 3111


## Company & Management - Updated Leadership

### OCMKB00001 - Founder CEO MD CBO
**Q:** Who is the founder of OnePWS?

**A:** Mr. Puneet Talesara ji is the Founder, CEO, and MD of OnePWS. For chatbot responses, present him as Founder, Chief Executive Officer, and Managing Director of OnePWS. Amit Sukhwal ji is the Chief Business Officer (CBO).

**Brand:** OnePWS  
**Source:** User-confirmed leadership update + OnePWS/Pyrotech company profile (User instruction dated 2026-05-13; PDF page 4; PWS Floor official management page)  
**Confidence:** highest

### OCMKB00226 - Public corporate database directors note
**Q:** What should the chatbot say about OnePWS Public corporate database directors note?

**A:** Mr. Puneet Talesara ji is the Founder, CEO, and MD of OnePWS. For chatbot responses, present him as Founder, Chief Executive Officer, and Managing Director of OnePWS. Amit Sukhwal ji is the Chief Business Officer (CBO). Additional context from earlier KB: Third-party corporate database results report directors/key management for ONEPWS Private Limited as Puneet Talesara and Kanishka Talesara in some listings, while older/former-name listings mention Puneet Talesara and Pratap Singh Talesara. Treat this as external corporate-directory information and verify on MCA for statutory use.

**Brand:** OnePWS  
**Source:** Public corporate database search results (https://www.zaubacorp.com/PYROTECH-WORKSPACE-SOLUTIONS-PRIVATE-LIMITED-U36109RJ2004PTC018899)  
**Confidence:** highest  
**Instruction:** Use the user-confirmed leadership correction first; then use the earlier context if relevant.

### OCMKB00234 - Introducing OnePWS : A New Chapter from OnePWS Innovation
**Q:** What is Introducing OnePWS: A New Chapter from OnePWS Innovation about?

**A:** A new chapter begins. OnePWS Pvt. Ltd. (formerly OnePWS Pvt. Ltd.) today officially announced its rebrand, marking a significant milestone in the company’s journey of growth, innovation, and transformation. This is more than a change of name. It is a reflection of who we have become-and where we are heading. Why the Rebrand? The rebrand to OnePWS Pvt. Ltd. represents this evolution. It reflects our transition from creating physical infrastructure to building intelligent, integrated environments that enhance performance, improve decision-making, and unlock human potential at work. The Story Behind OnePWS The name OnePWS is built around three powerful pillars: ONE Vision A unified direction that aligns design, engineering, and technology into a single purpose-creating environments that are future-ready and performance-driven. ONE Ecosystem We no longer look at solutions in isolation. Every space we build is part of a larger connected ecosystem where infrastructure, digital systems, and automation work seamlessly together. ONE Methodology Our approach integrates strategy, design.

**Brand:** OnePWS  
**Source:** Introducing OnePWS : A New Chapter from OnePWS Innovation (https://onepws.com/blog/onepws-pvt-ltd-new-chapter-begins/)  
**Confidence:** high  
**Instruction:** Use only the available source-backed information. Do not add unsupported claims.

### OCMKB00248 - Home
**Q:** What is Home about?

**A:** OnePWS Control Room Solutions ONE Name Unlimited Possibilities Onepws marks our transformation from OnePWS into a visionary force in intelligent, integrated environments - seamlessly uniting space, technology, automation, and intelligence into ONE powerful ecosystem. Explore Our Businesses Design Engineering Technology Intelligent Integration AI-Enabled Systems Why “ONE”? ONE is not a word. It is our philosophy of integration. We bring vision, systems, and methodology together - eliminating silos and creating mission-ready environments that function as a single intelligent ecosystem. ONE Vision Maximising human potential through intelligent environments. ONE Ecosystem Seamless integration of physical infrastructure and digital intelligence. ONE Methodology Design, engineering, automation, and technology working as one unified system. ONE Standard Precision-driven execution built for performance, safety, and scalability. ONE Outcome Future-ready environments that adapt, scale, and evolve. ONE Intelligence AI-driven and software-enabled systems integrated into physical spaces. All.

**Brand:** OnePWS  
**Source:** Home (https://onepws.com/home/)

### OCMKB00291 - Cookie Policy
**Q:** What Are Cookies?

**A:** Cookies are small text files stored on your device such as a computer, smartphone, or tablet when you visit a website. These files allow websites to recognize your device and store certain information about your preferences or previous actions. Cookies help websites operate efficiently and provide website owners with insights into how visitors interact with their platforms. This information helps improve the performance, functionality, and overall user experience of the website.

**Brand:** OnePWS  
**Source:** Cookie Policy (https://onepws.com/cookie-policy/)

**A:** Our Story OUR STORY With over two decades of expertise, we specialize in delivering end-to-end control room solutions that combine design intelligence, engineering precision, and operational efficiency. From concept to commissioning, we help organizations build spaces that enhance performance, improve decision-making, and ensure seamless operations. What started as a focused initiative in workspace innovation has today evolved into a global solutions provider, trusted across industries like Oil & Gas, Power, Defence, Transport, Smart Cities, and more. Vision To become the most admired global brand in its class. To continually offer innovative and best-quality solutions. To lead through research, excellence, people, process, and technology. Our.

### OCMKB00355 - Extended Product Responsibility
**Q:** What does Extended Product Responsibility say about Recycle?

**A:** Recycling involves converting waste materials into reusable forms or raw materials. For example, scrap steel and aluminum can be reused in manufacturing new sheets. Approximately 50% of our products consist of recyclable components such as aluminum, steel structures, and hardware. These materials can be easily processed by authorized recycling plants as per regional regulations. We label materials based on recyclability, helping customers dispose of components responsibly.

**Brand:** OnePWS  
**Source:** Extended Product Responsibility (https://onepws.com/extended-product-responsibility/)  
**Confidence:** high  
**Instruction:** Use only the available source-backed information. Do not add unsupported claims.

### OCMKB00356 - Extended Product Responsibility
**Q:** What does Extended Product Responsibility say about Upcycle / Mid-Life Refit / Refurbishing?

**A:** Upcycling: Reusing existing materials for new applications instead of discarding them. Refurbishing/Refit: Repairing components to restore their original functionality and appearance. Our consoles are 100% modular, meaning each unit is built from individually assembled components. This modularity ensures: Reduced waste generation Faster upgrades and maintenance Improved product lifecycle efficiency We offer: Module extension solutions for future expansion by adding new units Pre-manufactured modules for quick on-site installation Repair, buffing, and polishing of acrylic solid surfaces Replacement of tabletops, side panels, and shutters to refresh aesthetics These practices help customers extend product life, reduce waste, and minimize energy consumption.

**Brand:** OnePWS  
**Source:** Extended Product Responsibility (https://onepws.com/extended-product-responsibility/)  
**Confidence:** high  
**Instruction:** Use only the available source-backed information. Do not add unsupported claims.

### OCMKB00371 - About
**Q:** What is About about?

**A:** WHO WE ARE Your Vision, Our Solution Established in 2011, Workspace Metal Solutions Pvt. Ltd. is a trusted name in the domain of hospital infrastructure, with a core focus on modular operation theatres and critical care environments. The company designs, manufactures, and installs precision-engineered spaces that address the stringent clinical, hygienic, and operational standards of today’s healthcare sector. Over the years, Workspace Metal Solutions has cultivated a skilled and disciplined workforce committed to delivering technically sound, high-quality medical infrastructure solutions. Headquartered in Udaipur, the company caters to a broad spectrum of healthcare institutions across India and overseas. Its solutions are engineered to serve the needs of multi-specialty hospitals, medical colleges, diagnostics, ICUs, NICUs, and specialized surgical departments-offering reliability, performance, and adaptability in clinical environments. Our Mission To uphold our core principles by placing ethics and business integrity at the heart of every decision. Our approach remains.

**Brand:** Workspace Metal Solutions Pvt. Ltd. (WMSPL)  
**Source:** About (https://wmspl.co.in/about/)  
**Confidence:** high  
**Instruction:** Use only the available source-backed information. Do not add unsupported claims.

### OCMKB00425 - Leadership / CEO
**Q:** What information is on page 5 of the OnePWS old company profile?

**A:** According to the 2025 company profile, About OnePWS 
• Founded by Mr. Puneet Talesara, where innovation, 
passion, and empathy converge to redefine the 
Control Room Industry. 
• Commenced our journey humbly in 2006 with 
1000 Sq. M. and a team of 12. 
• Proudly stand on a foundation of 20,000 Sq. M. 
today, with a workforce of 400. 
• Unwavering vision: Achieve a turnover of 50 
million USD in the years to come. 
• Industry Pioneers 
• Introduced the world's inaugural “Design to 
Build” Control Room Solutions service. 
• Supplied over 55,000 operator consoles and 
350 Control Room Solutions to 25 countries, 
including leading organizations such as DRDO, 
ISRO, BARC, and more. 
• Contribution to the "Make in India" initiative, 
fostering opportunities across government 
sectors. 
5

**Brand:** OnePWS

**Confidence:** medium

stage

Linear Open Ceiling 
The Linear Open Ceiling is a stylish and versatile ceiling solution 
that combines modern design with functional elegance. 
Featuring evenly spaced linear slats, this ceiling system creates 
an open and airy feel, allowing for unobstructed airflow and easy 
access to the plenum. Its cleanlines and minimalist aesthetic 
make it an ideal choice for contemporary spaces like offices, 
retail environments, and public areas.

Flooring 
• A Raised Access Floor (also known as a False Floor or 
Access Flooring System) is a flooring solution that creates 
an elevated structural floor above a building's original floor 
slab. This space, typically between 150 mm to 1500mm. 
• Electrical wiring and power cables 
•Data and telecom cables 
•HVAC systems (like underfloor air distribution) 
•Plumbing or sprinkler systems 
•Security systems and sensors
•Easy access to services for maintenance or changes 
•Flexibility in layout for evolving tech or design needs 
•Improved air circulation when used with underfloor air distribution 
Benefits

Special Fire-rated doors ensure the safety of residents of the 
building from the risks & potential dangers of fire hazards. These 
doors have been certified by internationally renowned agencies 
and are available in a variety of materials such as glass sections, 
gypsum or steel. The complete range of Fire door systems 
provides an effective solution for all infrastructure applications, 
from residences to commercial facilities.

RS

Criteria: Stability & Integrity with Insulation Material 
Fire Rating: 60/90/120/180 Minutes 
Testing Standards: IS 3614 Part-2 & BS 476 Part 22 
Test Laboratory: CBRI/ BFRC/NABL accredited Lab 
Technical Specs: 
Frame: 1.2/1.6/2 mm...

Acoustic 
We follow the control room acoustic norms by keeping the sound level 
within the range of 45db in a control room environment.

smoke and flames to reduce the risk of hazardous accidents. 
ASTM E84 
Control Room Solution is GREENGUARD (UL-USA) certified for low chemical 
emissions of VOCs and carcinogens, contributing to a healthier control room 
environment. 
ROHS Certified console and interior system ensures the product does not 
have 6 major hazardous substances. 
Interiors

revised according to the same. 
• Currently Pyrotech is utilizing only single shift of our capacity. 
• Pyrotech has also added 03 new machines last year as a learning from Capacity Management to mitigate risk of any 
bottleneck machines. 
• Surtec and Paint Shop added in Pyrotech’ s Capabilities. 
Production Plant’s Capacity v/s Load analysis 
• We track our month-on-month load vs capacity with respect to ongoing project’s as well as future sale’s forecasts to take 
proactive decisions to manage the upcoming demands.

## Company & Management - PDF Page Knowledge

### OCMKB02969 - Manufacturing
**Q:** What information is on page 713 of the OnePWS old company profile?

**A:** According to the 2025 company profile, Supplier Segmentation, Monthly Supplier’s Performance Monitoring, Supplier Risk 
Management practices have been implemented and our internal Purchasing SOP has been 
revised according to the same. 
Bi-Annual SPC assessments are conducted to verify the accuracy of both machinery and manpower measurements, ensuring 
the maintenance of repeatability and reproducibility through the utilization of SPC process controls (MSA) 
•
The X-bar helps to monitor the average or the mean of the process 
and how this changed over time between the highest and lowest 
value in each sample. 
•
The R-chart shows the sample range, which shows the accuracy of 
QC readings. If the points are out of control in the R chart, then stop 
the process. Identify the special cause and address the issue. 
Statistical Process Controls (Cpk): 
713

**Brand:** OnePWS  
**Source:** 25.4.21 PWS Company Profile Ver_4_25.04_02_Shared.pdf (PDF page 713)  
**Confidence:** medium  
**Instruction:** Use as source knowledge; normalize Pyrotech Workspace to OnePWS in customer-facing answers.


## Company & Management - PDF Topic Knowledge

### OCMKB02970 - Manufacturing
**Q:** What does OnePWS say about Supplier Segmentation, Monthly Supplier’s Performance Monitoring, Supplier Risk?

**A:** According to the 2025 company profile, Supplier Segmentation, Monthly Supplier’s Performance Monitoring, Supplier Risk 
Management practices have been implemented and our internal Purchasing SOP has been 
revised according to the same. 
Bi-Annual SPC assessments are conducted to verify the accuracy of both machinery and manpower measurements, ensuring 
the maintenance of repeatability and reproducibility through the utilization of SPC process controls (MSA) 
•
The X-bar helps to monitor the average or the mean of the process 
and how this changed over time between the highest and lowest 
value in each sample. 
•
The R-chart shows the sample range, which shows the accuracy of 
QC readings. If the points are out of control in the R chart, then stop 
the process. Identify the special cause and address the issue. 
Statistical Process Controls (Cpk): 
713

**Brand:** OnePWS  
**Source:** 25.4.21 PWS Company Profile Ver_4_25.04_02_Shared.pdf (PDF page 713)  
**Confidence:** medium  
**Instruction:** Use this for topic-specific answers from the old profile.

### OCMKB03058 - Company Profile PDF
**Q:** What information is on page 723 of the OnePWS old company profile?

**A:** According to the 2025 company profile, Performance Monitoring, Supplier Risk Management practices have been implemented and 
our internal Purchasing SOP has been revised according to the same. 
• We have raw material identification stickers linked with it’s GRN & batch wise 
traceability, pasted on all inward material along with the Quality Clearance 
details. 
• We have also implemented an automatic material expiry intimation and 
blockage in SAP System to avoid issuance of expired adhesives. 
Material Traceability & Poka Yoke Controls 
GRN Stickers with QR Code 
Mistake 
Proofing / 
Poka Yoke 
723

**Source:** 25.4.21 PWS Company Profile Ver_4_25.04_02_Shared.pdf (PDF page 723)  
**Confidence:** medium

human errors.

New Folder Management
